resources.string: This option can be toggled on the About screen.
Remove "%1$s"? You can re-import it later with the same xpub.
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone. Make sure you have backed up your recovery phrase.
I understand this cannot be undone
You are about to view sensitive information for "%1$s".
Scan this QR code to import the %1$s
Android notifications are disabled for this app
Ibis is a self-custody wallet built for power users with a focus on privacy and customizability. All network services and external connections are disabled by default.
Open the options menu to begin configuring Ibis to your liking.
Open the Wallet Management screen to enable Liquid support for your desired wallets.\n\n*Liquid can only be enabled on BIP39 wallets.
Open the Wallet Management screen to enable Spark support for your desired wallets.\n\n*Spark can only be enabled on BIP39 seed wallets.
Use Configure node to add a remote Lightning Node wallet (LND, CLN, or NWC). Each connection is its own wallet — switch wallets to use a different node.
Channel list needs LND or CLN (not available via NWC)
Added "%1$s". Configure another node if needed.
Change addresses are not available for remote Lightning Node wallets.
Connect to LND REST (default port 8080). Scan an lndconnect QR or paste host, admin macaroon (hex or base64), and TLS cert PEM when required.
CLN clnrest (HTTPS). Host, port, and rune — scan Connection URL QR or paste. TLS optional.
Scan or paste a nostr+walletconnect:// URI from your NWC provider.
Unsupported connection QR — use clnrest+, lndconnect, or nostr+walletconnect Connection URL (not TLS cert-only)
Node responded. Save this Lightning Node connection?
Name will default to “%1$s” (change anytime in Wallet Management).
Rename this node wallet. Connection settings are separate.
Use a Lightning Address already configured on your node. Saved only to display a QR and share for receiving; settlement happens on the node.
Review confirmed. Routing the payment now.
Your node will return the final payment result.
Maximum percentage of the payment allowed for routing.
Set up LND, CLN, or NWC for this wallet.
Connect to a Liquid Electrum server to sync and send.
Connect to an Electrum server to sync and send.
Balances are hidden. Tap and hold the privacy icon to disable.
Search labels, payment ID, method, or date...
Spark is loading for this wallet
On-chain Spark deposits need 3 confirmations before they are credited to your Spark balance.
Confirmed on-chain deposits are credited automatically to your Spark balance.
Review confirmed. Bitcoin is executing the transaction now.
Amount, recipient, and fee were approved.
Sending the signed transaction to the network.
P2WPKH — Native SegWit addresses start with bc1q
P2TR — Taproot addresses start with bc1p
Set up PIN or biometric to open locked wallets
Wipe this transaction from local history. Restore it only by reimporting the seed phrase.
Wipe all %1$d transactions from local history. Restore them only by reimporting the seed phrase.
I understand this wipes the entire transaction history
Set up PIN or biometric first
Liquid error: PSET is temporarily unavailable for live use.
If swap fails, open Boltz rescue link and paste this 12-word seed.
Request features and report bugs on GitHub
Search address, label, amount, txid, or outpoint
Create a full app backup with wallets, labels, server settings, and general app settings. Security settings are excluded.
Restore a full app backup, review its contents, and choose what to restore. Security settings are excluded.
Review exactly what will be exported before saving the file.
Unencrypted backups contain seed phrases in plain text
Review the full backup details before exporting.
Select a full backup and review what will be restored. Security settings are always skipped.
This backup is encrypted. Enter the password to view its contents.
Existing wallets with the same seed will be skipped. Security settings are not restored.
Add a wallet to get started
Search labels, addresses, txid, or date...
Balance is ready. Transactions will appear shortly.
Recent activity will appear when sync completes.
Transactions will appear here after syncing
Showing the newest activity first while older history finishes loading.
Enable Layer 2 to view this Liquid watch-only wallet.
Tor Browser is required to view onion links. Please install it from the Play Store or F-Droid.
Replace this transaction with a higher fee (RBF)
Create a child transaction with high fee to speed up confirmation (CPFP)
Redirect all funds back to your wallet or a custom address. Requires a higher fee than the original.
Funds will be redirected to this Bitcoin address.
Paste raw transaction hex or complete signed PSBT
Note: trimmed signed PSBTs from hardware wallets may fail here.
Connect to an Electrum server to broadcast
Try next server if connection drops
I have backed up my seed phrase
Invalid Liquid descriptor pair. Paste one combined ct(...) descriptor or a matching /0/* and /1/* pair.
BIP39 seed, Electrum seed, WIF private key, xpub/zpub, descriptor, or address
Optional signer for this multisig wallet
Import a config file or enter cosigners manually
Import an Ibis wallet backup file
Enter the password to decrypt and review this backup.
Could not parse cosigner from QR
Scan each cosigner QR. Tap Cancel when finished.
Use a BIP39 seed or origin-prefixed xprv matching one cosigner fingerprint.
Liquid is loading for this wallet
This removes the pending invoice from the list. If it was already paid but not received, you may still need to claim it.
Unconfirmed UTXOs are disabled in settings
Your seed phrase is the ONLY way to recover your wallet. Anyone with access to it can steal your funds.
Make sure no one is watching your screen and never share this information with anyone.
This will rescan all addresses for transactions. Use this if missing transactions or after backup restore.
What would you like to reveal?
Scan or load signed PSBT for broadcasting.
Signed transaction received. Review and confirm to broadcast.
Paste signed PSBT base64 or raw transaction hex
Signed PSBT or raw tx hex
Set up PIN or biometric to enable
Unlock Ibis into a decoy wallet
Erase app data after failed unlock
Set up PIN code to enable
Hide Ibis behind a calculator app
The app icon will revert to Ibis Wallet after restart. You may need to re-add the homescreen shortcut.
The decoy wallet will be removed.
All wallet data will be permanently erased after repeated failed unlock attempts. This cannot be undone.
Make sure your seed phrases are backed up. Without a backup, your funds will be lost permanently.
Anyone with access to your device will be able to open the app.
Enter the PIN again to confirm
To trigger biometric unlock, press \'C\' on the lock screen PIN pad
BIP39 seed, Electrum seed, WIF private key, xpub/zpub, or address
Set a master fingerprint for better hardware wallet PSBT compatibility.
Enter this pin in the calculator app and press the \'=\' key to unlock
Add a wallet first to send Bitcoin
Turn on NFC in Android settings
Show fiat price at time of transaction
Swipe between balance, send, and receive
No Boltz swaps or lightning functionality
Enable Boltz or SideSwap in Layer 2 Options to use swaps.
Enable Boltz in Layer 2 Options to receive Lightning.
Swap will go to this Liquid address.
Swap will go to this Bitcoin address.
Select specific UTXOs for this swap
Selected L-BTC UTXOs will fund this swap.
Selected Bitcoin UTXOs will fund this swap.
Connect to an Electrum server to sweep
Default gap limit. Scan limit for empty addresses (1-99999)
Review confirmed. Spark is executing the transfer now.
Amount, recipient, and fee were approved.
Signing and sending the payment request.
Spark will return the final payment result.
Some hardware wallets do not support PSBT signing without a master fingerprint. Your hardware wallet should provide one alongside the xpub/zpub.
Fee rate is below the minimum (%1$s sat/vB)
Fee rate must be higher than current (%1$s sat/vB)
Review confirmed. Liquid is executing the transfer now.
Amount, recipient, and fee were approved.
Signing and sending the payment request.
Liquid will return the final transaction result.
Boltz/Liquid will return the final payment result.
Close anytime. Payment continues in background.

Restart the app to activate cloak mode.
Enter your cloak pin in the calculator app and press the = key to unlock.
Are you sure you want to delete "%1$s"?
Swap goes to this Bitcoin deposit address for Spark.
Not connected to Electrum. Check your server connection and try again.
Wallet is not ready. Reopen the wallet and try again.
Transaction not found in wallet. Sync, then open the pending transaction again.
Transaction is already confirmed. Fee bumps only work while it is still unconfirmed.
This transaction cannot be replaced. It may not signal RBF or was already replaced in the mempool.
New fee rate must be higher than the current transaction fee.
Not enough change or wallet balance to pay the higher fee. Try a lower rate or wait for confirmed funds.
Replacement would create an output below the dust limit. Try a slightly lower fee rate.
Could not build the replacement transaction. Sync the wallet and try again.
Could not sign the replacement transaction.
The network rejected the replacement. Try a higher fee rate, or sync in case the original already confirmed.
No spendable outputs from this transaction. It may already have been spent (for example by another CPFP) or confirmed.
Parent transaction not found in wallet. Sync and try again.
Parent transaction is already confirmed. CPFP only works while it is still unconfirmed.
Not enough funds for the CPFP fee. Lower the fee rate or wait for confirmed wallet balance.
Not enough funds for CPFP: %1$s BTC available, %2$s BTC needed.
CPFP change output would be below the dust limit. Use a lower fee rate.
Could not build the CPFP child transaction. Sync the wallet and try again.
The network rejected the CPFP transaction. Try a higher fee rate or sync and retry.
